steps.t: Rhiangar Nevit has asked you to listen to her tale of Luilloth. Rhiangar can be found in Crossway House, the inn of Herne.
Rhiangar Nevit has asked you to meet her near Dol Ernil. Dol Ernil is in north-western Cardolan.
Rhiangar Nevit has asked you to find a statue of Luilloth in Dol Ernil and to examine its base for clues. The statue of Luilloth is in Dol Ernil.
Upon examining the statue of Luilloth you discovered an ancient scroll! You should bring the scroll to Rhiangar. Rhiangar is by the roadside, near Dol…
